global_summary: The company is behind: 23 of 145 tasks done and a 16-point gap to plan. Most projects lost this week's key tasks to cashflow and material delays, with rough-ins, tiles and framing slipping into next week or August. Clifford Clack and Ginger Brown are the biggest risks needing weekend recovery.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Only the fireplace-and-door fix is done; painting, gutters, cleaning and final inspection all still open with no progress. Finish painting and the final building inspection by Fri Jul 10.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Nothing done yet; brick slipped to Sat Jul 11 on a cashflow delay buying bricks. Install gutters and finish cleaning by Sun Jul 12.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Foundation dug, but form board slipped out of this week to Mon Jul 13; slightly behind. Place form board Mon Jul 13 once Efrain returns.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: 22.6% of planned work-days earned vs 33.9% expected — behind (3/25 tasks done). Key slip: TILES: INSTALL TILES (Fri Jul 10 → Sat Jul 18, +8d).

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: No week tasks done; carpet, tiles and shutters all pushed out, carpet to Thu Jul 23, behind plan. Install the fireplace mantel by Mon Jul 13.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: No week tasks logged done; exterior sheathing, roof decking and doors/windows all slipped to Mon Jul 13, behind plan. Execute roof decking by Mon Jul 13.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Plumbing fix done; drywall hang-sheetrock is the only open week task and already past its Thu Jul 9 date. Hang sheetrock this weekend as the sub starts Saturday.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: 49.5% of planned work-days earned vs 61.6% expected — behind (6/20 tasks done). Key slip: FRAMING: EXECUTE (Sat Jul 4 → Tue Aug 4, +31d).

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: 53.1% of planned work-days earned vs 67.3% expected — behind (5/17 tasks done). Key slip: FINAL: PUNCH LIST COMPLETION (Thu Jul 23 → Mon Jul 27, +4d).
